_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Manipulate and clean large, disparate datasets for bulk analysis to identify connections.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-005 (DA, cosine: 0.381), DQ-T-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.376).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.571). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analysis, bulk, clean, connections, datasets, disparate] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.862, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Manipulate and clean large, disparate datasets for bulk analysis to identify con" and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.386 < STS 0.571 (gap -0.184). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, bulk, clean] and [access, business, catalog] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analysis, bulk, clean, connections, datasets, disparate]. WIDAI terms: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].
